article.body_preview:
DHAKA, May 30, 2023 (BSS) - A delegation from Cotton USA met with Bangladesh

Garment Manufacturers and Exporters Association (BGMEA) President Faruque

Hassan today to discuss potential collaboration on creating trade

opportunities that would be beneficial for both sides.

The team included William R. Bettendorf, Director, Supply Chain Marketing and

South Asia; Stephanie Thiers-Ratcliffe, Director, European Brands and

Retailers; and Ali Arsalan, Bangladesh Consultant, Cotton USA.

BGMEA Dire

llm_connections.evidence_quote: the lifting of the rule of mandatory fumigation of US cotton by Bangladesh has created a huge opportunity for both the USA and Bangladesh to enhance mutual trade.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The quote refers to bilateral, country-level trade between Bangladesh and the USA, which pertains to imports and exports at the national level as described in the balance_of_trade definition.
